full_text:
Tian Yu (Guorang) 田豫 (國讓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Yu (田豫), styledGuorang (國讓), was born in Yuyang. General of Wei under Cao Rui. Dispatched to Xiangyang to counter Wu’s invasion. Tian Yu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom, Gongsun Zan, Xianyu Fu, and the Wei Kingdom. Tian Yu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
